pipelines.summary: Ancient-DNA FASTQ-to-BAM-to-VCF DAG for terminal-damage-aware preprocessing, BAM damage and authenticity evidence, genotype-likelihood calling, explicit GL propagation, and downstream VCF QC.

checks: default corpus anchored to corpus-01-mini for governed aDNA-like FASTQ inputs
fastq.trim_terminal_damage is fixture-backed by corpus-01-mini
fastq.remove_duplicates stays downstream of terminal-damage trimming
bam.damage and bam.authenticity stay fixture-backed by corpus-01-adna-damage-mini
bam.contamination declares the ancient-DNA contamination panel contract
vcf.call_gl consumes BAM damage and authenticity evidence with ancient-DNA reference contracts
vcf.gl_propagation stays downstream of genotype-likelihood calling with explicit GL handoff coverage
vcf.qc stays downstream of propagated genotype-likelihood outputs

pipelines.summary: Ancient-DNA FASTQ-to-BAM-to-VCF DAG for governed terminal-damage trimming, duplicate-aware preprocessing, alignment, BAM damage and authenticity evidence, pseudohaploid calling, damage-aware filtering, and summary statistics.

checks: default corpus anchored to corpus-01-mini for governed aDNA-like FASTQ inputs
fastq.trim_terminal_damage is fixture-backed by corpus-01-mini
fastq.remove_duplicates stays downstream of terminal-damage trimming
bam.damage and bam.authenticity stay fixture-backed by corpus-01-adna-damage-mini
bam.contamination declares the ancient-DNA contamination panel contract
vcf.call_pseudohaploid consumes BAM damage and authenticity evidence with ancient-DNA reference contracts
vcf.damage_filter stays downstream of BAM damage evidence and pseudohaploid calling
vcf.stats stays downstream of damage-aware filtering

pipelines.summary: Amplicon-only FASTQ DAG for corpus-03 validation, primer normalization, ASV inference, chimera removal, OTU clustering, abundance normalization, and local reporting without BAM or VCF germline branches.

checks: default corpus anchored to corpus-03-amplicon-mini for governed amplicon inputs
pipeline remains fastq-only and rejects bam or vcf germline stages
fastq.normalize_primers, fastq.infer_asvs, fastq.cluster_otus, and fastq.normalize_abundance stay fixture-backed by corpus-03-amplicon-mini
fastq.normalize_primers keeps the governed primer contract explicit
fastq.infer_asvs and fastq.remove_chimeras keep ASV and chimera handoffs explicit
fastq.cluster_otus consumes normalized reads plus non-chimeric representatives
fastq.normalize_abundance stays downstream of OTU clustering with an explicit abundance table output
fastq.report_qc consumes ASV, OTU, and abundance evidence without mixing bam or vcf germline outputs

pipelines.summary: BAM authenticity DAG for governed ancient-like evidence composition over damage, contamination, complexity, coverage, mapping, and sex diagnostics.
Core BAM QC DAG for governed validation, pre-QC metrics, mapping summary, filtering, and coverage collation.
Cross-domain BAM-to-VCF DAG for governed BAM genotyping, exact VCF bridge handoff, downstream VCF filtering, summary statistics, cohort QC, and optional PCA and ROH branches.

checks: default corpus anchored to corpus-01-bam-mini for governed bam-genotyping bridge inputs
bam.filter, bam.coverage, and bam.recalibration stay fixture-backed by corpus-01-bam-mini while bam.genotyping stays fixture-backed by corpus-01-genotyping-mini
bam.genotyping keeps the filtered fallback path, recalibrated run path, and governed genotyping contracts explicit
vcf.filter consumes exact bam.genotyping vcf handoffs instead of a conceptual cohort-vcf placeholder
vcf.stats stays downstream of the filtered vcf bridge
vcf.qc stays downstream of filtered vcf and stats while exporting qc-qualified cohort outputs
optional vcf.pca stays downstream of qc with metadata contracts and pruned cohort handoffs
optional vcf.roh stays downstream of qc with the same qc-qualified cohort handoff

pipelines.summary: BAM genotyping DAG for explicit filtered-BAM, coverage-gated recalibration, and downstream genotype-calling handoffs.
BAM kinship DAG for explicit filtered-BAM, overlap-sufficiency, genotyping-readiness, and pairwise relatedness handoffs.
Core germline FASTQ-to-BAM-to-VCF DAG for governed read validation, read profiling, trimming, alignment, BAM QC, coverage, variant calling, filtering, summary statistics, and cohort QC handoffs.
Small-sample diploid FASTQ-to-BAM-to-VCF DAG for governed preprocessing, BAM filtering, coverage-gated recalibration, diploid calling, VCF QC, and an optional downstream phasing branch.

checks: default corpus anchored to corpus-01-mini for governed small-sample FASTQ inputs
bam.filter and bam.recalibration stay fixture-backed by corpus-01-bam-mini
bam.recalibration keeps the low-coverage gate and known-sites contracts explicit
vcf.call_diploid consumes both the filtered-BAM fallback and recalibrated-BAM run-path handoffs
vcf.call_diploid keeps explicit coverage and recalibration decision evidence
vcf.filter and vcf.stats stay downstream of diploid calling
vcf.qc stays downstream of filtered VCF and stats without depending on phasing
vcf.phasing remains an optional downstream branch with explicit map and panel contracts

pipelines.summary: eDNA taxonomy-only FASTQ DAG for corpus-02 validation, adapter-aware trimming, filtering, taxonomy screening, and taxonomy-local reporting without BAM or VCF germline branches.

checks: default corpus anchored to corpus-02-edna-mini for governed edna taxonomy inputs
pipeline remains fastq-only and rejects bam or vcf germline stages
fastq.validate_reads keeps the governed raw-fastq corpus handoff explicit
fastq.screen_taxonomy stays fixture-backed by corpus-02-edna-mini
fastq.screen_taxonomy remains downstream of filtered reads
fastq.screen_taxonomy keeps taxonomy database and expected-truth contracts explicit
fastq.screen_taxonomy keeps classification, unclassified, and summary outputs explicit
fastq.report_qc consumes taxonomy summary without mixing bam or vcf germline outputs

pipelines.summary: Amplicon FASTQ DAG for corpus-03 validation, primer normalization, ASV inference, chimera removal, OTU clustering, abundance normalization, and QC collation.
Core FASTQ preprocessing DAG for corpus-01 validation, read-length profiling, adapter detection, trimming, filtering, and terminal QC collation.
eDNA and microbiome FASTQ DAG for corpus-02 validation, trimming, filtering, profiling, and taxonomy screening against the governed local database fixture.
Paired-end FASTQ DAG for validation, adapter-aware trimming, pair merging, downstream filtering of merged and unmerged reads, and QC collation.
Cross-domain FASTQ-to-BAM DAG for governed preprocessing path outputs, BAM alignment, and downstream BAM QC handoffs.
FASTQ UMI DAG for governed validation, UMI extraction, duplicate-aware preprocessing, and QC collation.
Cohort VCF DAG for governed QC, pruning and filtering, PCA, admixture, and population-structure summary with mandatory sample metadata and population labels.

checks: default corpus anchored to vcf_production_regression for governed cohort-vcf population-structure inputs
vcf.qc, vcf.pca, vcf.admixture, and vcf.population_structure stay bound to the vcf_cohort asset profile
vcf.qc exports the governed pruning/filtering handoff for downstream cohort analysis
vcf.pca requires sample metadata, population metadata, and population labels as explicit inputs
vcf.admixture requires sample metadata, population metadata, and population labels as explicit inputs
vcf.admixture stays downstream of pca with explicit pca evidence
vcf.pca and vcf.admixture both export sample-metadata join handoffs
vcf.population_structure consumes the pca and admixture metadata-join handoffs with mandatory labels

pipelines.summary: Target-cohort VCF DAG for governed reference-panel preparation, target QC, optional prephasing, imputation, and downstream imputation metrics with explicit panel identity and asset-profile provenance.

checks: default corpus anchored to vcf_production_regression for governed target-cohort VCF inputs
vcf.prepare_reference_panel stays bound to the vcf_reference_panel asset profile
vcf.qc stays bound to the vcf_cohort asset profile
vcf.phasing, vcf.impute, and vcf.imputation_metrics stay bound to the vcf_cohort_with_panel asset profile
vcf.prepare_reference_panel keeps panel, map, and reference contracts explicit
vcf.phasing consumes the qc-qualified target VCF plus prepared-panel identity for the optional prephasing branch
vcf.impute consumes both the qc-target fallback path and phased run path with explicit panel identity
vcf.imputation_metrics stays downstream of imputation execution with panel-provenance and imputation-qc evidence

pipelines.summary: Cohort VCF DAG for governed QC, kinship and IBD, ROH, and demography with explicit localization of insufficient-data branches.

checks: default corpus anchored to vcf_production_regression for governed cohort-vcf relatedness inputs
vcf.qc, vcf.ibd, and vcf.roh stay bound to the vcf_cohort asset profile
vcf.demography stays bound to the json_ibd_segments asset profile
vcf.qc exports the qc-qualified cohort and pruning handoffs for downstream segment analysis
vcf.ibd stays downstream of qc with explicit insufficiency evidence
vcf.roh stays downstream of qc without depending on ibd outputs
vcf.demography stays downstream only of ibd with explicit insufficiency propagation
ibd insufficiency remains local to demography and does not block roh or qc outputs
